mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id, a.user_pw, a.acc_status, b.comm_name AS accSttsNm, a.app_status, c.comm_name AS appSttsNm, a.user_login_fail_cnt, a.user_expired_date, a.pw_expired_date, FROM TB_USERS a LEFT OUTER JOIN COMM_TBL b ON a.acc_status = b.comm_no AND b.system_id = 'LOGIN' AND b.param_value = 'ACC_STATUS' LEFT OUTER JOIN COMM_TBL c ON a.acc_status = c.comm_no AND c.system_id = 'LOGIN' AND c.param_value = 'APP_STATUS' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USERS SET user_login_fail_cnt = 0 WHERE 1=1 AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE TB_USERS SET user_login_fail_cnt = user_login_fail_cnt + 1, user_status = CASE WHEN user_login_fail_cnt + 1 >= 5 THEN 'LOCKED' ELSE acc_status END WHERE 1 = 1 AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE TB_USERS SET acc_status = 'LOCKED' WHERE 1=1 AND user_id = #{userId} AND user_login_fail_cnt >= 5
UPDATE TB_USERS SET acc_status = 'ACTIVE', user_login_fail_cnt = 0 WHERE 1=1 AND user_id = #{userId} AND user_status = 'LOCKED' AND user_login_fail_cnt >= 5
